name: Holo 3D
summary: A real graphical OS (KolibriOS) streamed to WebGL — verified and 100% serverless.
comment_shared: Holo 3D vendors v86 + Three.js + the OS image under ./vendor and ./images and ships no OS-shell chrome, so the whole app lives in one service-worker scope (holo-3d-sw.js) and boots offline/standalone. Nothing is pulled from the shared OS surface at runtime.

description.p: A real graphical operating system (KolibriOS) boots on the v86 x86 engine and is streamed to WebGL — flat, sharp, full-screen, fully interactive (pointer-lock mouse + keyboard), with a live render-quality control.

Every byte is admitted by content address: the v86 engine, its wasm core, both BIOSes and the OS image are content-addressed and κ-gated — re-derived before execution and refused on any mismatch (Law L5). After first load the service worker serves the whole app from the κ-store, so it boots with the origin server OFF.

ul: Real x86 graphical OS on v86 (BSD-2) — mouse, keyboard, windows
κ-gated engine + BIOS + image: bytes admitted by content address
100% serverless after first load (offline κ-store cache)
Live quality control: Sharp · Ultra 2× · Native · Pixel-perfect · Performance
Swap the image κ-pin to boot any v86-bootable OS

releases.description: Flat sharp WebGL stream, pointer-lock input, live quality control, offline κ-store SW.
